_note: Run terminated after trial 5 (silent failure in Optuna study at trial 6+, possibly OOM on CPU). Reported as exploratory 5-trial Optuna sweep due to compute constraint (CPU-only training of FT-Transformer is ~2-2.5 h/trial). Best params not captured in log output; final RMSE is the minimum across the 5 logged trials.
comparison_summary: FT-Transformer sits between RF (2.510) and MLP (2.578); 2.4% worse than XGBoost. Reinforces 'regional re-training is main contribution, gradient-boosted/RF dominate tabular SR-DEM at this scale' framing.
